Navigation.logoAlt: Quick Exit — rapid liquidity platform for assets

Auth.welcomeSubtitle: Use your email below (you'll receive a magic link) or sign in with Google. One account covers listings, offers, and the Negotiation Room.
Auth.emailLabel: Create an account or sign in with email
Auth.autoAccountHint: If you don't have an account yet, one will be created automatically when you click the link in your email.
Auth.magicLinkSent: ✓ Check your inbox! We've sent you a sign-in link.
Auth.web3Maintenance: ⚠ WalletConnect is under maintenance for Phase 2.

Hero.subtitle: Quick Exit connects sellers who need fast liquidity with buyers who have capital and are looking for below-market opportunities.

auction.title: Open auction — 30 days
auction.description: For sales where you want multiple bids and manual selection of the best offer.
auction.disclaimer: No automatic winner. Payment and handover are arranged directly between parties.

economy.title: Maximum exposure
economy.description: For listings that need more time in market view.

standard.title: Fast sale
standard.description: Balanced listing duration, cost, and visibility.

urgent.title: Validation & listing
urgent.description: Manually verified listings with guaranteed access to the Negotiation Room and qualified investors.
benefits: Full access to the Negotiation Room with investors

Packages.chooseSpeedDescription: Your package sets how long the listing stays promoted and how quickly you want buyer engagement.
Packages.listingFeeNote: Payment activates listing publication and exposure. It does not guarantee the asset will sell.

Pricing.heroDescription: Your package defines duration, priority, and how your listing is exposed on the platform.

capitalRequest.title: Capital Request
capitalRequest.description: Publish available capital for urgent below-market acquisitions.

guestOffer.title: Guest Offer
guestOffer.description: Submit a direct offer without a verified account.

Pricing.howToChooseTitle: How do I pick the right package?
Pricing.howToChooseNotInHurry: If you're not in a rush:
Pricing.safeTransactionsDescription: Quick Exit does not process payments between parties or hold funds in escrow. Verify the asset, documentation, and the other party's identity before payment or handover.

Home.metaTitle: Quick Exit | Rapid liquidity platform for assets
Home.metaDescription: Quick Exit connects sellers seeking fast liquidity with buyers and investors ready to acquire assets.

futureMobility.title: Future Mobility
futureMobility.line1: Premium on-order import for next-generation electric vehicles.
futureMobility.line2: Final configuration and price are confirmed together with the partner.

listings.title: Active sale listings
listings.accountHint: Browse without an account. To publish, submit offers, and access the Negotiation Room, you'll need a simple account.
listings.empty: No active listings at the moment.

capital.title: Available capital
capital.description: Buyer requests with stated budgets — verify details directly with each counterparty.
capital.empty: No capital requests registered at the moment.
capital.fallbackText: Publish the asset you want to acquire or explore active buyer requests.

auctions.title: Open auctions
auctions.description: Assets with a bidding window of up to 30 days. The seller manually selects the right offer.
auctions.disclaimer: No automatic winner. Payment and handover are arranged directly between parties.
auctions.emptyTitle: No active auctions at the moment
auctions.emptyDescription: Open auctions let sellers receive offers for up to 30 days and manually select the right bid.

safety.title: Safe transaction guidelines
safety.description: Quick Exit does not process payments or hold funds in escrow. Before payment or handover, verify the asset, documentation, and the other party's identity.
tips: For large amounts, use a contract and professional advisory.
Never enter card details on links sent by other users.

globalStats.declaredValueLabel: Declared value in listings and requests
globalStats.declaredValueSub: Amounts stated in listings and requests
globalStats.declaredValueEmpty: There are currently no cumulative declared amounts in active listings and requests, or values are missing.
globalStats.activeDemandsSub: Published on the platform; budgets are verified directly between parties

auction.firstOffer: Be the first to submit an offer

DemandCard.budgetDisclaimer: The budget is stated by the buyer and must be verified directly between parties.
DemandCard.sellCtaAria: Sell your asset for the request: {targetAsset}

Footer.tagline: Platform for accelerated sales and direct contact in Romania. We connect assets with interested buyers and investors through technology; fund availability is not verified by the platform.
Footer.accountHint: Browse without an account. To publish, submit offers, and access the Negotiation Room, you'll need a simple account.

Kyc.bannerDescription: You already have paid activity on Quick Exit. To build trust and increase credibility with buyers, complete account verification.
Kyc.identityHelp: Identity verification helps protect buyers and sellers.
Kyc.softHint: After you complete payment and have your first active listing or request, we recommend verifying your account for added trust — not required before payment.

Didit.trustBadgeAriaLabel: KYC Secured by Didit — identity verification partner

PostListing.pageDescription: Complete your asset details, set your price, and choose your sale speed.
PostListing.successDescription: Your listing is live. Track offers from your account.

checkoutErrors.authRequired: You must be signed in to publish. Open My Account, sign in, and return to this step.
checkoutErrors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your listing. Please try again.
checkoutErrors.invalidPackage: Invalid package for checkout. Please try again.
checkoutErrors.paymentFailed: We couldn't initialize payment. Please try again.
checkoutErrors.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload your images. Check your files and try again.
checkoutErrors.genericFailed: We couldn't complete your request or start checkout. Please try again.

pricingMode.question: How do you want to present the price?
pricingMode.step3Body: Choose how you want the price to be presented in the listing.
pricingMode.selectToContinue: Select one of the options to continue.
pricingMode.fixedPriceNote: The price will be displayed without evaluation or automatic market comparison.
pricingMode.priceOnRequestNote: The price will not be displayed publicly. Interested buyers will be able to request the complete offer.
pricingMode.evaluatedIntro: Use the estimate as a reference, then set the price at which you want to sell quickly.
pricingMode.changeWarning: Changing the pricing mode may remove the existing valuation, discount and deal score.

validation.fixedPriceRequired: Enter a valid sale price greater than 0.
validation.evaluatedNeedsPrice: Enter a sale price to continue.
validation.selectOptionToContinue: Select one of the pricing options to continue.

evaluated.title: QuickExit valuation
evaluated.description: QuickExit estimates the market price and highlights the gap versus your sale price.

fixed_price.title: Fixed price
fixed_price.description: You set the sale price directly, without valuation and without automatic market comparison.

price_on_request.title: Price on request
price_on_request.description: The price is not publicly displayed. Interested users request the full offer.

meta.unavailableDescription: This listing is not publicly available at the moment.
meta.seoListedInCategory: {title} is listed on Quick Exit for a fast sale in the {category} category.
meta.seoListed: {title} is listed on Quick Exit for a fast sale.
meta.seoCta: See the exit price, details, and opportunity.

unavailable.title: Asset unavailable
unavailable.description: This listing is no longer available or has been removed from the platform.

gallery.lightboxHint: Click outside the image or press Esc to close

auction.title: Open auction
auction.beFirstOffer: Be the first to submit an offer.
auction.offersReceived: {count, plural, =1 {1 offer received} other {# offers received}}
auction.disclaimer: The highest offer does not win automatically. The seller manually selects the right offer, and the transaction is completed directly between parties.

details.empty: Technical details have not been provided.

priceAdvantage.title: Price advantage
priceAdvantage.positionedCopy: Price positioned below the available market reference.
priceAdvantage.disclaimer: References may vary by configuration, taxes, availability and documentation.

trust.title: Trust
trust.contactHint: Contact details are shared through official QuickExit channels.
trust.processHint: Details and documentation are confirmed directly before transaction.

errors.sellerUnavailable: The seller is not available for negotiation.
errors.ownListing: This is your listing — negotiation is initiated by buyers.
errors.roomOpenFailed: We couldn't open the negotiation room. Please try again.
errors.offerSubmitFailed: We couldn't submit your offer. Please try again.
errors.acceptSubmitFailed: We couldn't submit your confirmation. Please try again.

safety.warning: Do not send money in advance and do not enter card details via links from other users. Verify the asset and details directly with the seller.
safety.comingSoon: Coming soon: save criteria and get alerts for new listings.

seller.title: Seller
seller.contactHint: Contact details are shared only through an offer, to protect both parties.
seller.transactionHistory: Transaction history will be available after the first confirmed sales on the platform.

premiumSeller.title: QuickExit professional profile
premiumSeller.enableProfile: Enable my professional profile on this listing
premiumSeller.vehicleReviewed: I personally filmed and tested this vehicle

financing.title: Estimated financing
financing.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. It is not a binding financing offer. Final terms depend on the financing partner and application review.
financing.consentLabel: I agree that QuickExit may contact me about this request and share my information with a partner to assess financing options.
financing.successBody: QuickExit will contact you about this request. This is not a binding financing offer and does not guarantee loan approval.
financing.duplicateError: You already submitted a request for this vehicle in the last 24 hours.
financing.validationError: Please check the details you entered and try again.
financing.genericError: Your request could not be sent. Please try again later.
financing.unavailable: The calculator is not available for these values.

share.title: Share the opportunity
share.description: Copy a ready-made message and send it to buyers or your network.

sections.onlyListing: This is the seller's only public asset at the moment.
sections.noSimilar: No other assets are currently available in the "{category}" category.

futureMobility.seoAvailableOnOrder: Available on order on Quick Exit.
futureMobility.partnerConfirmNote: Final configuration and price are confirmed together with the partner.

verified.title: Trust on the
verified.privacyHint: We do not publicly display phone or email. Legitimate contact happens through an offer.
verified.transactionHistory: Transaction history will be available after the first confirmed sales on the platform.

docs.title: Document
docs.intro: Marked listings are structured to include the usual documents for transactions in the selected category:
docs.footer: The exact list varies by asset type. Final details are agreed with the seller after submitting an offer.

aiScore.title: Liquidity
aiScore.description: Score {score} reflects a combination of market and liquidity factors (indicative, not a guarantee).

accept.title: Price
accept.successBody: The seller has been notified about your agreement at {price}. They may contact you using the details submitted with your offer.
accept.confirmQuestion: Do you confirm purchase at {price} (fast sale price)?
accept.contactHint: Leave your details — the seller will contact you through agreed channels

offer.title: Submit
offer.successBody: The seller has been notified and may contact you using the details you provided.
offer.messagePlaceholder: Message for the seller (e.g. payment terms, response deadline)...

FutureMobility.metaDescription: Premium electric vehicles available on order through Quick Exit — premium import with configuration and final price confirmed with the partner.
FutureMobility.title: Future Mobility
FutureMobility.subtitle: Premium electric vehicles, available on order.
FutureMobility.subtitleLine2: Premium on-order import. Final configuration and price are confirmed together with the partner.
FutureMobility.emptyDescription: Future Mobility models will appear here as soon as they are published. Check back soon or contact us for availability.
